feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: Personal website of Kyriakos Psarakis — Software Engineer at Ververica, PhD in Data Systems from TU Delft. Research on stream processing, distributed systems, and serverless computing.

entry.title: Welcome to my blog
entry.content:
Welcome to my blog! I plan to share thoughts and insights on topics I work with daily, including stream processing, distributed systems, and software engineering in general.

Stay tuned for upcoming posts.
entry.summary: Introducing my personal blog where I will share insights on stream processing, distributed systems, and software engineering.
